issues.description: make install never calls `pre-commit install --hook-type pre-push`; the pre-push gate would be silently absent for all fresh clones after Task C is merged
issues.resolution_source: first-principles (AGENTS.md: quality gates must be enforced for all developers; make install is the authoritative setup command)
issues.resolution: Task D updated: Makefile install target now adds `pre-commit install --hook-type pre-push` as a second call; Test Plan row D updated accordingly
